'''Sapha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] prisoner with red hair. She along with her fellow prisoners [[Roa]], [[Fasgo]], and the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Wurth Skidder]], under the alias of [[Keyn]], were part of the growing of a [[yammosk]] aboard the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ship [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']].<ref name="NJO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
